## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guide](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Lint passes: `ruff check memlink/`
- [ ] Format passes: `ruff format --check memlink/`
- [ ] Type check passes: `mypy memlink/`
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality.
- [ ] If adding a format: field mapping table included and fixtures added.
